# Leon List*Created: Sunday, October 29, 2023 at 1:37:30?PM*<div><h1>Leon List</h1></div>
<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li><b>Bu</b><b>y </b><b>FIV</b><b>E </b><b>v</b><b>isa </b><b>gif</b><b>t car</b><b>ds for</b><b> $</b><b>50</b><b> </b><b>E</b><b>ACH</b><b> </b><b>,</b><b> </b><b>use </b><b>funds</b><b> from </b><b>Venmo </b><b>- </b><b> dry </b><b>important to</b><b> get</b><b> </b><b>five </b><b>$5</b><b>0 </b><b>gif</b><b>t </b><b>car</b><b>ds. </b><b><br></b></li>
<li><b>Appl</b><b>y for PG</b><b>&amp</b><b>E </b><b>FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE:</b><b><br></b></li>
<ul>
<li>Find out why we owe over $1000 - itŐs back pay from our old place we havenŐt paid all of it down  <br></li>
<li>Apply for this:  If you have recently lost your job, even if you are receiving unemployment benefits, you may qualify for a reduced energy rate through our CARE or FERA programs.Ę<u>Visit Financial assistance and support</u>ĘorĘ<u>CARE/FERA</u>.<br></li>
</ul>
<li>Get diapers and paper towels - <b>is there </b><b>an upd</b><b>ate on when</b><b> they sh</b><b>ould be</b><b> delivered</b><b> please? </b><br></li>
<li>Set up garage and other utilities payment, set up payment plan, we can pay $100 for now - <b>w</b><b>ho do we nee</b><b>d to conta</b><b> for thi</b><b>s? </b><b>Is th</b><b>ere an email </b><b>I can </b><b>follow</b><b> up wit</b><b>h or is</b><b> there a li</b><b>nk to ou</b><b>r pro</b><b>per</b><b>ty</b><b> </b><b>website/</b><b>platform</b><b>? </b><br></li>
<li><b>- </b><b><br></b></li>
<li>Follow up with eve on security and garage opener and fob <br></li>
<li>Pick up meds from CVS (azstarys for Leon) </li>
<li><b>CVS - PICKUO ELLA PHOTO FOR SCHOPL PROJECT MINDAY (see confirmation below)</b></li>
<li>Pristiq-<b>Pick up anxiety medicine for me from CVS- pristiq </b></li>
<li>Get diapers and paper towels </li>
<li><b>Reschedule Kiska </b><br></li>
<li><b>Refill marinas meds at Safeway - go there if they donŐt answer- omeprazole &amp sertraline </b><br></li>
<li>Register with nova </li>
<li>Pick up meds from CVS (azstarys for Leon) </li>
<li><b>CVS - PICKUO ELLA PHOTO FOR SCHOPL PROJECT MINDAY (see confirmation below)</b></li>
<li>Pristiq-<b>Pick up anxiety medicine for me from CVS- pristiq </b></li>
<li>Set Tesla appointment for check in on the tires for next week <br></li>
<li>Register with nova </li>
<li><b>Refill marinas meds at Safeway - go there if they donŐt answer- omeprazole &amp sertraline </b></li>
<li>Call adobe animal hospital - Reschedule Kiska as possible and get them to send a new prescription for the thyroid medicine for <b>now</b> to Brava pharmacy - adobe animal hospital </li>
<li>Set Tesla appointment for check in on the tires for next week </li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">Call adobe animal hospital - Reschedule Kiska as possible and get them to send a new prescription for the thyroid medicine for </span><b><span style="font-size: 16px">now</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px"> to Brava pharmacy - adobe animal hospital </span><br></li>
<li>Tesla - 844-837-5285 - payments 1 and 2 - called and left a message <br></li>
<li><b>Call PGE - remove Ortega from our bill</b><br></li>
<li>Deposit Murad check - ASAP </li>
<li><b>Go to pharmacy at Safeway on shoreline and ask them to 1) refill EllaŐs cyproheptadine , 2) refill your pristiq , and 3) transfer all prescriptions to Safeway on shoreline  from CVS on el Camino in Mountain View for you me and Ella. Very important to get 1&amp2 today. </b><br></li>
<li>Call Bank of America</li>
</ul>
